description.content: Recording management and retrieval

Retrieves all recordings in your workspace with pagination support. Can be filtered by studio, project, or date range. Returns newest recordings first with a default cap of 20 per page. Rate limited to once every 10 seconds per unique request.

query.description: Filter recordings created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Filter recordings created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

response.name: Paginated list of recordings

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves a single recording with associated tracks and metadata. Rate limited to one request per 10 seconds per unique recording ID.

variable.description: (Required) The recording ID (obtainable via "Copy Recording ID" in the recording menu)

Production workspace organization
Retrieves all productions in your workspace, including their associated studios and projects. Rate limited to one request per second.

response.name: List of productions with studios and projects

The Riverside Business API provides programmatic access to recording management, production workflows, studio and project organization, file downloads, transcription retrieval, export management, and webinar registration. Available on the Business plan with custom pricing. Authentication uses API key bearer tokens.
